parameters.prompt: A hexagonal standoff 20 mm tall with a 12 mm across-flats hex body and a concentric 4.2 mm through-hole along its central axis.

stages.name: setup
stages.message: CAD runtime present: build123d 0.10.0, cadpy, scripts/step found at /opt/text-to-cad/skills/cad

stages.name: generate
stages.message: model.step exported from model.py via scripts/step; STL and GLB sidecars also written

stages.name: inspect
stages.message: STEP re-imports as positive-volume solid (2217.065 mm³); all 3 spec dims verified: height=20mm, across-flats=12mm, hole-dia=4.2mm

stages.name: snapshot
stages.message: snapshot.png rendered via offscreen-mesh fallback (trimesh + matplotlib, 37905 bytes)

stages.name: report
